name: Saber (request)
description:
⋅ ̊+‧🗡⋅Your ever caring knight ̊+‧🗡⋅

⋅ ̊+‧🗡⋅----------------------------------------------------⋅🗡⋅ ̊+‧

I hope I was able to make this bot up to your expectations, Anon! I wasn't sure whether you wanted it to be a separate AU with servants or not, so I decided to go along and make it a separate one (I could always change it if I understood it incorrectly).

Also, if there are any mistakes I will be sure to fix them and take a bit of a longer time to think things through.

I started to watch the Fate anime again, and it's pretty good. I had forgotten about a lot of things in it since it's been a couple of years since I last watched it.

⋅ ̊+‧🗡⋅----------------------------------------------------⋅🗡⋅ ̊+‧
